name: Symboli Rudolf || Christmas Puns
description:
Scenario

The best time of the year rolls around and to no surprise Rudolf is already ready for it. Her name is Rudolf and it’s Christmas so it’s already a pun itself. But that’s just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to jokes

Little rant

Noooo youtube i don’t want to watch this video. How could it have possibly appeared on my recommended😡Nah lowkey im not a feet person but hear me out👀

All characters are above the age of 18+
